Notes: Initial transition enters the main shopping composite state.
Shopping composite represents the active checkout behavior where scanning and related actions occur.
Shopping initial state goes to ReadyForNextItem.
ReadyForNextItem represents readiness to scan or choose another action.
Invalid barcode scan loops in ReadyForNextItem.
Uses guard for nonexisting barcode.
Invalid barcode scan shows an error.
Invalid product code loops in ReadyForNextItem.
Uses guard for nonexisting product code.
Invalid product code shows an error.
Valid product code moves to item weighing.
Uses guard for existing product code.
Valid barcode moves to security weight check.
Uses guard for existing barcode.
Shows the scanned item but does not explicitly add it before security check.
Cancel everything from Ready requests clear all override.
Override type is encoded by targeting OverrideClearAll.
Remove item from Ready requests item override.
Requires at least one item on the bill.
Override type is encoded by targeting OverrideClearItem.
Own bag action moves to bag weighing.
Pay from Ready moves to payment processing.
Pay transition requires billHasItems.
Payment request is sent on entry to payment processing.
WeighingProductCodeItem represents weighing a product-code item.
Cancel during item weighing returns to Ready.
Received item weight moves to security check.
Shows item with weight but does not explicitly add weighed item before security check.
AwaitingSecurityCheck represents the security weight check.
Matching security weight returns to Ready.
Uses weightMatches guard for matching weight.
Nonmatching security weight requests override.
Uses negated weightMatches guard.
Targets item-clearing override state.
Cancel everything during security check requests override.
Targets clear-all override state.
WeighingBag state is present.
Bag weight received returns to Ready.
Adds bag and shows bag count.
Cancel bag weighing returns to Ready.
OverrideRequired composite represents staff override.
OverrideRequired has entry action to turn light on.
OverrideRequired has exit action to turn light off.
Valid staff code in item override returns to Ready.
Correct code is checked and item type is represented by OverrideClearItem.
Valid item override clears item from bill.
Valid staff code in clear-all override returns to Ready.
Correct code is checked and everything type is represented by OverrideClearAll.
Valid clear-all override clears everything and resets.
Incorrect staff code self-loops in override substates.
Uses invalid override code guard.
Timeout warning from Shopping enters TimeoutWarning.
Incorrect override code shows an error.
H is included in Shopping and continue targets it to resume.
TimeoutWarning represents the countdown state.
Starts a 60 second countdown on entry.
Countdown reaching zero returns to Ready for next customer.
Countdown expiry clears everything.
Countdown expiry resets for the next customer.
PaymentProcessing represents waiting for payment result.
Payment failure returns to Ready.
Payment failure shows an error.
Payment cancellation returns to Ready.
Payment success returns to Ready for next customer.
Payment success prints the bill.
Payment success resets for the next customer.
Extra states are reasonable refinements such as separate override types.
Extra transitions are reasonable operational details.
No fundamentally incorrect extra guards.
Extra actions such as showing messages and clearing pending items are reasonable.
Additional composites are acceptable organization choices.
No incorrect parallel regions are present.
No incorrect extra history states are present.
